title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released V4, a flagship LLM that achieves significant reductions in inference compute and cost while maintaining or improving performance. The model represents a shift toward leaner, more efficient LLMs in the competition between open and closed AI labs.
